name: main

evidence.segment: game (renamed to main in splat.yaml based on game loop analysis)

key_functions.main_game_loop: Top-level game loop — set screen to BOOT, init RSP, loop dispatching scenes via tr_scene_change + ScreenProfile::initFunc
key_functions.gfx_render_frame: Render one frame: build F3D DL (clear, scene, overlay, extra), submit to RSP, execute render callbacks, ping-pong framebuffers
key_functions.gfx_init_frame: Init GFX state for a scene: segment setup, empty DR batch, warmup frame

summary: Main game loop + per-frame renderer + scene dispatch + transition effects (fade FSM). Also contains fullscreen quad rendering via GT ucode, framebuffer management, and the transition state machine (fade-in/hold/fade-out).

functions.name: main_game_loop
functions.summary: Top-level entry: sets screen to SCREEN_BOOT, calls rsp_game_init, then loops forever dispatching screen profiles. Each iteration: spawns tr_scene_change task, calls the screen's initFunc, waits for transition, updates screen ID.

functions.name: gfx_render_frame
functions.summary: Core per-frame renderer. Gets current GFX context, sets up F3D display list pointers (gF3dDisplayListPtr, gOverlayDlPtr, gF3dExtraListPtr, gDrBatchPtr, gExtraBatchPtr). Clears screen, renders scene DL, overlay DL, extra DL. Submits extra GT batches via gExtraBatchPtr. Calls rsp_wait_idle, executes render callbacks, then rsp_vi_sync + rsp_submit_gfx_tasks. Accumulates render time, wraps frame counter at 0x100.

functions.name: gfx_init_frame
functions.summary: Init GFX state: selects framebuffer via D_8005BFCE, sets up segment 0x01 with current framebuffer, submits empty DR batch (clear + fill), waits for RSP idle, calls rsp_vi_sync + rsp_submit_gfx_tasks (warmup frame).

functions.name: tr_obj_alloc
functions.summary: Allocates an Object from pool type 1 (x_69f86dd8). Sets callback to x_a1821d40, attaches to task slot 2. Sets gTaskLock = TRUE and sFadeAlpha = 0.

functions.name: tr_player_load
functions.summary: Loads a player character during scene transition. Waits for pool resources. Branches on game mode: for character select mode (x_79c2dc5b) calls x_3c859f4e; for other modes with pre-existing character enables shadow mode + waits for fade transition complete flag (x_700de048). Restores shadow mode state, stops/resumes sequence player.

functions.name: func_80001C6C
functions.summary: Attract mode entry: resets state flags, sets gTaskLock, spawns tr_fade_start, waits for fade-in (x_bee364e0). Then waits for both players to release Start button. Sets screen to SCREEN_ATTRACT, waits again for button release, then calls rsp_wait_idle + rsp_vi_sync(FALSE).

functions.name: tr_scene_loop
functions.summary: Scene transition main loop. Waits for tr_fade_start to signal ready (x_bee364e0) and tr_fade_out to signal done (x_e3ff543d). Each frame checks if players press Start to trigger tr_player_load. When transition done, spawns another tr_fade_start for the new scene. Calls gfx_init_frame twice at end.

functions.name: tr_quad_opaque
functions.summary: Builds an opaque fullscreen quad via GT batch (G_RM_OPA_SURF). Sets vertex alpha + brightness from sOverlayBrightness. NON_MATCHING.

functions.name: tr_quad_xlu
functions.summary: Builds a translucent fullscreen quad via GT batch (G_RM_XLU_SURF). Sets vertex alpha + brightness from sOverlayBrightness. NON_MATCHING.

functions.name: tr_fade_out
functions.summary: Fade-out per-frame callback: decrements sFadeAlpha by 8 until below sFadeThreshold, then disables GFX_SHADOW_MODE, signals x_e3ff543d (fade done). Renders translucent quad each frame.

functions.name: tr_fade_out_delay
functions.summary: Fade-out delay callback: counts to 7 frames with black quad, then sets sFadeAlpha=255, transitions to tr_fade_out. Renders opaque black quad each frame.

functions.name: tr_scene_change
functions.summary: Scene change entry: calls x_292e1d02 to init task. If abort flag (x_23ebd6b0) set, signals done and returns. Otherwise enables GFX_SHADOW_MODE, blacks out VI, sets up transition flags, chains to tr_fade_out_delay or tr_fade_out. Renders opaque black quad.

functions.name: tr_fade_hold
functions.summary: Fade hold callback: renders opaque quad at current sFadeAlpha. Counts 5 frames then signals x_bee364e0 (fade ready).

functions.name: tr_fade_in
functions.summary: Fade-in per-frame callback: increments sFadeAlpha by 8 then by 1 until 255. When fully opaque, transitions to tr_fade_hold.

functions.name: tr_fade_in_setup
functions.summary: Fade-in with shadow mode: enables GFX_SHADOW_MODE, runs task setup via x_f1ca6ba2. Then fades in same logic as tr_fade_in but with shadow mode active.

functions.name: tr_fade_start
functions.summary: Fade FSM entry: resets sFadeAlpha to 0 unless x_ecbcd14e flag set. Clears x_ecbcd14e flag. Sets callback to tr_fade_in_setup. Renders translucent quad.

globals.D_8004937C: UnkStruct10 timing values {0, 90, 0, 0} — fade timing A
globals.D_80049384: UnkStruct10 timing values {0, 233, 500, 0} — fade timing B
globals.gCurrentScreenId: Current screen/arena ID (used by cam_follow, model, menu, present)
globals.sPrevScreenId: Previous screen ID (menu.c compares for transition logic)
globals.sRenderTimeAccum: Render time accumulator for perf counters
globals.sFrameCounter: Per-frame counter (wraps at 0x100, drives timing reset)
globals.sFadeAlpha: Global fade alpha (0-255, used by main/menu/present/hud/practice)
globals.sQuadBatch: GT batch descriptor for fade quad
globals.sQuadDl[5]: Display list commands for fade quad (PipeSync + SetCombineMode)
globals.gOverlayDlPtr: Write pointer for overlay/scroll display lists
globals.gExtraBatchPtr: Write pointer for extra GT batches (trail, sparks, item, HUD, fade)
globals.x_e30d50d2: Main state flags bitfield (used across all screens — fade ready, transition flags, etc.)

macros.g_PERSPNORM(pkt, dl): G_PERSPNORM macro (was x_d8fc928a) — emits G_PERSPNORM microcode command

open_questions: D_80049290[14] — unused light data, not referenced in C. Maybe ROM padding?
D_8004937C/D_80049384 — UnkStruct10 timing values, exact meaning of each field unknown
D_8005BFC4, D_8005BFCC — BSS variables never read in C, possibly padding
x_c485761a addr macro: (u32)((ptr) - 0x80000000) — converts virtual to physical. Name TBD
x_a4e17949 addr macro: (void *)((u32)(ptr) + 0x80000000) — physical to KSEG0. Name TBD
